text:
- added → `Open` (`Publish{Opened}`)
- content changed → `Replace` (`Publish{Changed}`)
- **only `arm` advanced** → `Refresh` (`Publish{Refreshed}`) — the distinct TTL-refresh reason
- scope close → `Close` → host builds the final `Expire` [...] `identical_state_commit_is_deduped` — commits the same `on_distill("T","reading")` twice at the same tick bucket; asserts `second.effects.is_empty()` ("identical re-commit must not publish"). Also `distill_change_publishes_and_attributes_to_activity`: exactly one `Publish{Changed}` and `why_command("s1").input_causes.contains(activity_node)` — the "why did it publish this" receipt attributes it to the `activity` input (commits run at `AuditExplanationLevel::DependencyPaths`).
